opportunityId.title: opportunityId
opportunityId.description: The Salesforce Opportunity ID to create the quote on. Use the opportunityId from Create Opportunity or Get Account Opportunities.

productIds.title: productIds
productIds.description: Comma-separated Product2 IDs to add as quote line items. Use the whitespaceProductIds from Analyze Whitespace, or a subset based on user selection.

quoteName.title: quoteName
quoteName.description: Optional name for the quote. If not provided, a default name is generated.
